title: Tala Ceramic Baking Beans - Reusable Heat Resistant Blind Weights - Oven Beads for Pies, Tarts, and Pastry Crusts - Bakeware Accessories - Approx. 700g
features: CERAMIC BAKING BEANS: The ultimate baking tools for perfect blind baking! The Tala baking beans are ceramic stones that help prevent pie dish crusts or other pastries from shrinking and blistering while baking. Covers a 32cm tart tin

FOR FLAWLESS BAKING: Made from heat-resistant ceramic, these reusable pie weights help distribute heat evenly and keep the pastry flat so you get a crisp even bake without air bubbles. Simply hand wash the blind baking beans and store until the next use

HOW TO USE: Roll out your pastry dough into your dish. Prick the base with a fork to prevent air bubbles and line it with baking parchment paper. Pour your ceramic baking beads on top of your pie crust and slide it into the oven

QUALITY MATERIALS: Trustworthy baking equipment that is entirely food safe. The baking beans for blind baking pastry are BPA-free, sustainably made, fridge and freezer-friendly, and durable. Hand-wash and air dry only. Ensure pie beans are cool before handling

MASTERS OF BAKING: The Tala Everyday collection includes a diverse range of kitchen gadgets, utensils, bakeware and household products. Established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality kitchenware, bakeware and cookware
description: From the manufacturer Tala Ceramic Pie Beans Tala Baking Beans in Airtight Glass Storage Jar Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 12,892 4.7 out of 5 stars 12,892 Description These ceramic baking beans are a must-have when blind baking pies, tarts and pastries. These blind weights help prevent blistering and shrinkage during baking by distributing the heat evenly for a perfect crust that won't go soggy. These baking beans are cleverly designed to evenly distribute weight and heat to prevent the pastry from shrinking and splitting. They come stored in a glass jar making them perfect for displaying on your kitchen counter. Size Covers a 32cm tart tin. Approx 700g. Covers a 32cm tart tin. Approx 700g.
